info.name: VaxTrack — Operational Manager Module
info.description:
Complete Operational Manager API collection for VaxTrack. Login first (folder 0) to auto-capture {{omToken}}. Set {{baseUrl}} = http://localhost:5000.

## End-to-end state flow
1. OM Dispatch — POST /api/logistics/assign on a RATE_FIXED enquiry → Logistics.assignmentStatus = PENDING; Enquiry.status = ASSIGNED.
2. Driver trip — Submitting a trip does NOT set Enquiry to COMPLETED; only the OM packing approval does.
3. Munshi packing — POST /api/munshi/packing/:assignmentId → Packing SUBMITTED, Logistics assignmentStatus COMPLETED until OM packing decision.
4. OM Approve packing (terminal) — POST .../assignments/:assignmentId/approve → Packing APPROVED, Logistics APPROVED, Enquiry.status = COMPLETED.

## Packing lifecycle
1. Munshi submits → SUBMITTED + assignment COMPLETED
2. OM reject (optional) → REJECTED + omRemark
3. Munshi resubmit → SUBMITTED + assignment COMPLETED
4. OM approve → APPROVED + Enquiry COMPLETED

## Variables (cross-collection)
Paste into this collection before dispatch: {{enquiryId}} (Mongo _id from Field Owner create response), {{companyId}}, {{munshiId}}, {{driverId}} from master-data dropdowns. POST Assign Logistics saves {{assignmentId}} automatically.

request.description: Login and auto-capture token into {{omToken}} via test script.
Returns the logged-in OM's profile (name, role, mobile).
Writes a LOGOUT audit log entry. Client must delete the stored token after this call (JWT is stateless).
Registers or updates the FCM push registration token for this user.
Deregisters/removes the FCM push registration token for this user.
Returns KPIs: fixedPlots (ready to assign), teamsAssigned, activeTrips (pending review), approvedTrips, pendingReview. Also returns recentActivity (last 5 assignments with farmer + team details).

item.name: GET Plots — Unassigned (RATE_FIXED, no logistics yet)

query.description: Date filter: today, yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD

request.description: Returns RATE_FIXED enquiries that have no Logistics record yet. These are the plots the OM needs to assign a team to.

query.description: Date filter: today, yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD

request.description:
NEW — Returns the OM's full active workload in a single request.

Includes enquiries with status RATE_FIXED or ASSIGNED.
Each record includes a `logistics` key containing the assigned team (munshi, driver, vehicle, schedule), or `null` if not yet assigned.

Security: `purchaseRate` is NEVER returned in any logistics object.
Enquiry object includes `farmerMobile` for direct farmer contact.

This is the DEFAULT view (no ?stage= param also returns stage=All).

query.description: Date filter: today, yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD

request.description:
Returns Logistics assignments where assignmentStatus is PENDING. The team has been assigned and is awaiting completion.

Enquiry object includes `farmerMobile` for direct farmer contact.
Security: `purchaseRate` is excluded from all logistics objects.

query.description: Date filter: today, yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD

request.description:
Returns assignments where assignmentStatus is COMPLETED, REJECTED, or APPROVED. These represent all assignments that have completed the OM review phase (either accepted as-is, rejected with notes for resubmission, or finally approved/locked for Finance).

Enquiry object now includes `farmerMobile` for direct farmer contact.
Security: `purchaseRate` is excluded from all logistics objects.

Use this to show OM's full history of reviewed assignments across all review states.

query.description: Date filter: today, yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD

request.description: Returns assignments where assignmentStatus is REJECTED. These represent all assignments that have been rejected by the OM and are awaiting resubmission from the Munshi.

item.name: GET Plots — Pending OM Approval (Munshi/Driver Submitted)

query.description: Date filter: today, yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD

request.description: Returns assignments where assignmentStatus is COMPLETED. These represent all assignments that have been submitted by the Munshi but are pending approval or rejection by the OM.

query.description: Date filter: today, yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD

request.description: Returns assignments where assignmentStatus is APPROVED. These represent all assignments that have been finally approved by the OM and are ready for Finance.

query.description: Date filter: today, yesterday, or YYYY-MM-DD

request.description: Returns assignments where the OM approved the packing report, but the Admin has not yet marked the final approval. These plots are currently in PENDING_ADMIN_APPROVAL status.

item.name: GET Form Dropdowns (Munshi, Driver, Vehicle, Company)

request.description:
Call on form load to populate all select boxes. Returns:
- companies[], agents[], generations[], selectors[], brands[]
- eicherDrivers[] — each with { _id, firstName, lastName, mobileNo, vehicleId: { vehicleNumber, vehicleType } }
- pickupDrivers[] — same shape as eicherDrivers

Drivers now include their linked vehicle so the frontend can display vehicle number alongside driver name without a separate call.

Assigns a Munshi + Driver team to a RATE_FIXED enquiry.

## FE Update (2026-04-03)

**vehicleId / vehicleNumber — AUTO-RESOLVED.**
Backend auto-resolves from driver.vehicleId. If driver has no vehicle linked, returns 400.

**Enquiry Override** — companyId, packingType, totalBoxes are written back to the Enquiry document to keep it as the source of truth.

**packingType** enum: '4H', '5H', '6H', '8H', 'CL', '7Kg', 'Other'
**totalBoxes** — Required. Total number of boxes for this assignment.

**purchaseRate** — Optional (no longer required).
**lightInTime / lightOutTime** — Optional. Notification shows 'TBD' if omitted.

Triggers WhatsApp alerts to Munshi, Driver, and Farmer.
Test script captures _id into {{assignmentId}}.

Allows Operational Manager or Admin to modify the assigned teamName, munshiId, or driverId. If driverId is changed, vehicleId is auto-resolved from their driver profile. If munshiId changes, a WhatsApp alert is sent to the new Munshi.

Returns the full chain for any assignment: the root original assignment, all rollovers (extra days), and all overflows (extra vehicles). Walks up parentAssignmentId to find the root, then fetches all descendants.

Response: { original, rollovers[], overflows[], totalRelated }

Assigns or updates the main Eicher driver for this assignment. Resolves the driver's vehicle and updates both driverId and vehicleId in the logistics record.

Access: Admin, Operational Manager

Assigns or updates the secondary pickup driver for this assignment.

Access: Admin, Operational Manager

item.name: GET Execution Detail (Merged Assignment + Trip + Packing)

request.description:
Returns a single unified JSON containing:
- `assignment`: Full logistics record (company, munshi, driver, vehicle, light times)
- `trip`: Driver's submitted report (KM, tolls, fuel slip, farmer box breakdown) + reviewStatus
- `packing`: Munshi's packing report (box counts by type, wastage, brand)
- `executionStatus`: { packingSubmitted, tripSubmitted, reviewStatus }

Values are null if the respective team member hasn't submitted yet.

PREREQUISITE: The Driver must have submitted their Trip report first (tripSubmitted = true in executionStatus).

Approves the trip report. Sets reviewStatus = APPROVED, stores reviewedBy = OM's userId, logs the audit action.
Rejects the trip report. reviewNote is REQUIRED when rejecting — this note is shown to the driver as the rejection reason.

Rejects a submitted packing report and requests Munshi to resubmit.

## Side Effects:
- Packing status → REJECTED
- Logistics assignmentStatus → REJECTED
- Packing.omRemark = the remark text (shown to Munshi)

## Munshi Workflow:
1. Munshi receives notification that their packing report was rejected
2. Munshi calls GET /api/munshi/assignments/{{assignmentId}}/packing to fetch the report + see omRemark
3. Munshi corrects the box counts and calls PUT /api/munshi/assignments/{{assignmentId}}/packing to resubmit
4. Resubmission clears omRemark and sets assignmentStatus back to COMPLETED

**remark** is REQUIRED — describe what needs to be corrected.

Final approval for the packing report. This locks the assignment into APPROVED status.

## Prerequisites:
- Packing status must be SUBMITTED (Munshi has already resubmitted after rejection, or first submission is good)
- Assignment must belong to an OM (cannot be re-edited after approval)

## Side Effects:
- Packing status → APPROVED (locked)
- Logistics assignmentStatus → APPROVED
- **Parent Enquiry.status → COMPLETED** (terminal closure for this plot)
- Munshi can no longer edit or resubmit once approved

**approvalNote** is OPTIONAL — Finance / audit notes.

## 4-Step Packing Lifecycle:
1. **Munshi Submits** → Packing = SUBMITTED, Assignment = COMPLETED
2. **OM Rejects** (optional) → Packing = REJECTED, Assignment = REJECTED + omRemark
3. **Munshi Resubmits** → Packing = SUBMITTED, Assignment = COMPLETED
4. **OM Approves** → Packing = APPROVED, Assignment = APPROVED, **Enquiry COMPLETED**

Driver trip submit does **not** set Enquiry COMPLETED.

item.name: POST Issue Diesel Advance to Driver

formdata.description: OPTIONAL — override vehicle number. If omitted, auto-resolved from driver's linked vehicleId.
OPTIONAL — reason/notes. Can be omitted entirely from the request body.
Optional — link to a logistics assignment

request.description:
Issues a fuel advance to the driver.

vehicleNumber is now OPTIONAL — it is auto-resolved from the driver's linked vehicleId.vehicleNumber. Only send vehicleNumber if the driver is using a different vehicle than their default (edge case).

If the driver has no vehicle linked AND no vehicleNumber in body → returns 400 with a helpful message.

Triggers WhatsApp receipt to the driver's registered mobile. Audit log is created automatically.

query.description: Filter by a specific logistics assignment

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of all diesel advances. Populated with driver name/mobile, OM name, and linked assignment details.

Use ?driverId= to filter per driver or ?assignmentId= to see advances for a specific trip.

NEW — Fetches all users with the role of Munshi.

Use this to populate the 'Assign Munshi' dropdown during the logistics dispatch process (POST /api/logistics/assign).

Returns array of Munshi users with: _id, firstName, lastName, mobileNo, role.
Exposes the secure live diesel and petrol prices for a given location, wrapping the third-party Fuel Price API with a local mock fallback configuration.
Returns the notification feed for the logged-in OM. Use this to display alerts (missed trips, pending reviews, system messages) in the app notification panel.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: In-app notification feed — Operational Manager sees only their own notifications (scoped by recipientId). Auto-triggered by: Rate fixed on a plot (RATE_FIXED), packing report submitted for review (PACKING_SUBMITTED).

query.description: Pass true to return only unread notifications

request.description: Returns paginated in-app notifications for the logged-in Operational Manager. Response: { total, unreadCount, page, pages, data[] }
Fetches dynamic app configuration (e.g. screenshot restrictions).

item.name: 8. Reports (NEW June 2026)
item.description: New dedicated reporting endpoints. Require Operational Manager token.

query.description: Required for Admin/OM to query a specific driver's reports

request.description: Fetches monthly payout reports and day-wise details for a specific driver (Eicher or Pickup). Requires driverId query parameter for Admin/OM.
